decoder_heading: Usage Details.
ident_heading: Usage Details.
heading_content_part: Usage Details.When you access and use the App, we may automatically collect certain details of your access to and use of the App, including traffic data, location data, logs, and other communication data and the resources that you access and use on or through the App.

decoder_heading: Device Information.
ident_heading: Device Information.
heading_content_part: Device Information.We may collect information about your mobile device and internet connection, including the device’s unique device identifier, IP address, operating system, browser type, mobile network information, and the device’s telephone number.

decoder_heading: Stored Information and Files.
ident_heading: Stored Information and Files.
heading_content_part: Stored Information and Files.The App also may access metadata and other information associated with other files stored on your device. This may include, for example, photographs, audio and video clips, personal contacts, and address book information.

decoder_heading: Location Information.
ident_heading: Location Information.
heading_content_part: Location Information.This App collects real-time information about the location of your device, including GPS signals, device sensors, Wi-Fi access points, and cell tower IDs, if you have granted us access to that information.

decoder_heading: Biometric information.
ident_heading: Biometric information.
heading_content_part: Biometric information.This App collects biometric information such as your exercise, activity, sleep, or health data, including the number of steps you take, distance traveled, calories burned, weight, heart rate, sleep stages, active minutes, and any similar information to which you grant us access**.**

decoder_heading: Other information.
ident_heading: Other information.
heading_content_part: Other information.In addition to the foregoing, this App collects other information that you provide, including account information such as your biography or country; information for features of the services provided by products and this App, for example, an alarm, information about your friends, and logs for food, weight, sleep, or water; messages regarding the products or services; and information recorded by your device which may vary depending on the device you use.

decoder_heading: Other information.
ident_heading: Other information.
heading_content_part: If you do not want us to collect this information do not download the App or delete it from your device. For more information, see below regarding the disclosure of your information. Note, however, that opting out of the App’s collection of location information will disable its location-based features.We also may use these technologies to collect information about your activities over time and across third-party websites, apps, or other online services (behavioral tracking).

decoder_heading: Cookies (or mobile cookies).

heading_content_part: Cookies (or mobile cookies).A cookie is a small file placed on your smartphone. It may be possible to refuse to accept mobile cookies by activating the appropriate setting on your smartphone. However, if you select this setting you may be unable to access certain parts of our App.

decoder_heading: Web Beacons.
ident_heading: Web Beacons.
heading_content_part: Web Beacons.Pages of the App, our emails, and related websites may contain small electronic files known as web beacons (also referred to as clear gifs, pixel tags, and single-pixel gifs) that permit the Company, for example, to count users who have visited those pages or opened an email and for other related app statistics (for example, recording the popularity of certain app content and verifying system and server integrity).

decoder_heading: Similar Technologies.
ident_heading: Similar Technologies
heading_content_part: Similar Technologies. We use technologies that are similar to cookies or web beacons for the same purpose.
